<!--
Thanks for contributing! Please keep PRs focused on one logical change.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for guidelines.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change do, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / build / tooling
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (e.g. `feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`)
- [ ] `make check` passes locally (fmt, vet, lint, test, vulncheck)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated docs (README / DESIGN) if behavior or interface changed
- [ ] Change stays within the project's **read-only diagnostic** scope

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything that needs extra context, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->
